skill.title: Snowflake
skill.info: Expert in Snowflake architecture, implementation, and optimization — leveraging multi-cluster virtual warehouses, clustering keys, result caching, and resource monitors for high-performance, cost-efficient operations. Hands-on with Snowflake Openflow, Streams, Tasks, Time Travel, Fail-Safe, Materialized Views, and Data Sharing. Proficient across all licensing tiers: Standard, Enterprise, Business Critical, and VPS.

skill.title: Cloud & AWS
skill.info: Expert in Snowflake-centric AWS architecture — designing secure, high-performance data platforms using AWS PrivateLink, S3 Storage Integrations, Kinesis, and AWS DMS. Also fluent in Azure SSO and cross-cloud replication strategies.

skill.title: Data Modeling
skill.info: Deep expertise in conceptual, logical, and physical data modeling using Star and Snowflake schemas, Data Vault 2.0, Kimball/Inmon methodologies, 3NF, OLAP, OLTP, and ODS layer design. Tools include CA Erwin, ER Studio, and Visio.
